purpose: Post an actual journal entry (AJE/RJE/PAJE/TJE) into the engagement trial balance via FinancialPrep. Distinct from workbench-api /v1/JournalEntryReport, which only creates a JE *report* workpaper.
transport: XMLHttpRequest (in-page; engagement→FP cross-origin fetch fails CORS)

body_template.documentId: <OPTIONAL int — WPM documentId of a referenced workpaper; omit if none>

amount_format: Money side: {value:'USD'+amount.toFixed(2), currency:'USD'}. Empty side: {currency:'USD'} (no value key).
balance_rule: sum(debit) must equal sum(credit); enforce client-side before POST.
verify: Trust 201 + returned id, or GET /v1.0/journalentry?engagementId={clientId}&periodId={engagementId} and match by id/comment.
gotchas: Request body uses lowercase 'rollforwardOption'; the read-back echoes 'rollForwardOption' (capital R).
journalEntryType is a STRING. AJE/RJE/PAJE are confirmed. CCH term is 'PAJE' (accept 'PJE' as a synonym). TJE rides the same path but is not verified — firm never uses it (no commercial tax clients).
Workpaper reference is a TOP-LEVEL 'documentId' (int), NOT a per-lineItem field.
journalEntryId != 0 edits an existing JE — NOT scripted (no edit/delete; manual per firm rule).
no_hard_delete: CREATE only. No edit/delete call scripted.
